data.biography:
Charles Robert Redford Jr. (August 18, 1936 – September 16, 2025) was an American actor, director and activist. Throughout his career, he won several film awards, including the Academy Award for Best Director for his 1980 film Ordinary People. He also received an honorary Academy Award for Lifetime Achievement in 2002 and was also the founder of the Sundance Film Festival. In 2014, Time magazine named him one of the 100 most influential people in the world, and in 2016 he was honored with a Presidential Medal of Freedom.

Appearing on stage in the late 1950s, Redford's television career began in 1960, including an appearance on The Twilight Zone in 1962. He earned an Emmy nomination as Best Supporting Actor for his performance in The Voice of Charlie Pont (1962). His greatest Broadway success was as the stuffy newlywed husband of co-star Elizabeth Ashley's character in Neil Simon's Barefoot in the Park (1963). Redford made his film debut in War Hunt (1962). His role in Inside Daisy Clover (1965) won him a Golden Globe for the best new star. He starred alongside Paul Newman in Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid (1969), which was a huge success and made him a major star. He had a critical and box office hit with Jeremiah Johnson (1972), and in 1973 he had the greatest hit of his career, the blockbuster crime caper The Sting, a re-union with Paul Newman, for which he was nominated for an Academy Award; that same year, he also starred opposite Barbra Streisand in The Way We Were. The popular and acclaimed All the President's Men (1976) was a landmark film for Redford.

In the 1980s, Redford began his career as a director with Ordinary People (1980), which was one of the most critically and publicly acclaimed films of the decade, winning four Oscars including Best Picture and the Academy Award for Best Director for Redford. He continued acting and starred in Brubaker (1980), as well as playing the male lead in Out of Africa (1985), which was an enormous box office success and won seven Oscars including Best Picture. He released his third film as a director, A River Runs Through It, in 1992. He went on to receive Best Director and Best Picture nominations in 1995 for Quiz Show. He received a second Academy Award—for Lifetime Achievement—in 2002. In 2010, he was made a chevalier of the Légion d'Honneur. He additionally won BAFTA, Directors Guild of America, Golden Globe, and Screen Actors Guild awards.
data.name: Robert Redford

data.biography: Charles Robert Redford, Jr. war ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler, Filmregisseur und Filmproduzent. Er zählte seit den späten 1960er Jahren zu den populärsten Hollywoodschauspielern und war zwischen 1973 und 1976 der kassenträchtigste Filmstar. Redford hat neun Spielfilme inszeniert und für sein Regiedebüt Eine ganz normale Familie 1981 den Oscar erhalten. Außerdem war er auch als Umweltschützer aktiv und unterstützte unter anderem den Natural Resources Defense Council.

Charles Robert Redford, Jr., plus connu sous le nom de Robert Redford, est un acteur et réalisateur américain né le 18 août 1936 à Santa Monica en Californie.

En 1966, il devient célèbre grâce à deux films dramatiques : La Poursuite impitoyable et Propriété interdite. Le western Butch Cassidy et le Kid sort trois ans plus tard et consolide sa notoriété. S'ensuivent d'autres succès, tels Les Hommes du président, L'Arnaque, Gatsby le Magnifique, Out of Africa ou encore L'Homme qui murmurait à l'oreille des chevaux.

Il remporte l'Oscar du meilleur réalisateur pour Des gens comme les autres en 1981 ainsi qu'un Oscar d'honneur pour l'ensemble de sa carrière en 2002.

Charles Robert Redford Jr. (nacido el 18 de agosto de 1936), más conocido como Robert Redford, fue un actor, director de cine, productor, empresario, modelo, ambientalista, filántropo y fundador del Festival de Cine de Sundance. Recibió dos premios Oscar: uno en 1981 por dirigir Ordinary People y otro por Lifetime Achievement en 2002. Sus películas populares incluyen Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid (1969), Jeremiah Johnson (1972), The Candidate (1972), The Sting (1973), The Way We Were (1973), The Great Gatsby (1974), Three Days of the Condor (1975), All the President's Men (1976), The Natural (1984), Out of Africa (1985) y Zapatillas (1992). Como cineasta, sus películas notables incluyen Ordinary People (1980), A River Runs Through It (1992), Quiz Show (1994), The Horse Whisperer (1998) y The Legend of Bagger Vance (2000).

Descripción extraída del artículo de Wikipedia Robert Redford, con licencia CC-BY-SA, lista completa de colaboradores en Wikipedia.

Redford był dosyć niesfornym dzieckiem. Za sukcesy sportowe otrzymał stypendium, które umożliwiło mu rozpoczęcie nauki w University of Colorado. Jednak nie zagrzał tam długo miejsca, ponieważ został wyrzucony z uczelni za... pijaństwo. Wyjechał więc do Europy, gdzie zaczął kształcić się w zawodzie malarza. Edukację kontynuował w nowojorskim Pratt Institute, ale brak sukcesów na polu artystycznym spowodował, że swoje zainteresowania skierował na aktorstwo. Ukończył American Academy of Dramatic Arts i został zaangażowany do występów na Broadwayu. Debiutował w roku 1959 w sztuce "Tall Story", a 4 lata później zyskał sławę rolą w komedii Neila Simona "Boso w parku". W 1962 roku po raz pierwszy wystąpił w filmie, zyskując bardzo przychylne opinie. Jednak w karierze przeszkadzała mu jedna rzecz... jego uroda. Otóż Redford, będąc bardzo przystojnym i wysportowanym mężczyzną, przez długi czas grywał podobne typy bohaterów: kochanków lub uwodzicieli. Walcząc o zmianę swojego "image'u" odrzucił udział w takich filmach jak: "Kto się boi Virginii Woolf" i "Absolwent", by w 1969 roku u boku Paula Newmana wystąpić w roli rewolwerowca w filmie "Butch Cassidy i Sundance Kid". Uczyniło to z niego gwiazdę pierwszej wielkości, a co więcej, Redford pokazał, że jest w stanie grywać różne typy bohaterów. W 1980 roku zadebiutował po drugiej stronie kamery reżyserując film "Zwyczajni ludzie", za który otrzymał Oscara i Złoty Glob. Redforda uważa się nie tylko za jednego z najlepszych aktorów, ale i najwybitniejszych reżyserów. Aktor jest również zaangażowany w ruch ekologiczny. Wiele czasu i pieniędzy poświęca na popularyzację tej tematyki. Równie wiele zawdzięcza Redfordowi amerykańskie kino niezależne. To właśnie z inicjatywy Roberta w 1996 roku powstał pierwszy kanał telewizyjny poświęcony temu rodzajowi sztuki filmowej.

찰스 로버트 레드포드 주니어(1936년 8월 18일 – 2025년 9월 16일)는 미국의 배우, 감독, 그리고 사회운동가였다. 그는 경력 전반에 걸쳐 여러 영화상을 수상했는데, 그중에는 1980년 영화 **《보통 사람들(Ordinary People)》**로 받은 아카데미 감독상도 포함된다. 또한 2002년에는 아카데미 평생공로상을 수상했으며, 선댄스 영화제의 창립자이기도 했다. 2014년, 타임(Time)지는 그를 세계에서 가장 영향력 있는 100인 중 한 명으로 선정했으며, 2016년에는 대통령 자유 메달(Presidential Medal of Freedom)을 수여받았다.

1950년대 후반 무대에 처음 등장한 레드포드는 1960년에 텔레비전 경력을 시작했으며, 1962년에는 **《트와일라잇 존(The Twilight Zone)》**에 출연했다. 그는 같은 해 방영된 **《The Voice of Charlie Pont》**에서의 연기로 에미상 남우조연상 후보에 올랐다. 브로드웨이에서 가장 큰 성공은 닐 사이먼의 희곡 **《맨발로 공원에서(Barefoot in the Park, 1963)》**였으며, 이 작품에서 그는 공동 출연자인 엘리자베스 애슐리의 캐릭터 남편 역을 맡았다. 레드포드는 1962년 영화 **《War Hunt》**로 영화에 데뷔했으며, 1965년 작품 **《Inside Daisy Clover》**에서의 연기로 골든 글로브 신인상을 수상했다. 그는 1969년 폴 뉴먼과 함께 출연한 **《내일을 향해 쏴라(Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid)》**로 엄청난 성공을 거두며 일약 스타덤에 올랐다. 이후 **《제레미아 존슨(Jeremiah Johnson, 1972)》**으로 비평과 흥행 모두에서 성공을 거두었고, 1973년에는 다시 폴 뉴먼과 함께 출연한 범죄 영화 **《스팅(The Sting)》**으로 경력 최고의 흥행작을 만들어냈다. 이 작품으로 그는 아카데미 남우주연상 후보에 오르기도 했다. 같은 해, 그는 바브라 스트라이샌드와 함께 **《우리 있었네(The Way We Were)》**에도 출연했다. 1976년의 **《대통령의 사람들(All the President's Men)》**은 레드포드의 대표작으로 꼽히는 중요한 영화였다.

1980년대에 들어서면서, 레드포드는 감독으로서의 경력을 시작했다. 그의 첫 연출작인 **《보통 사람들(Ordinary People, 1980)》**은 당대 가장 평단과 관객으로부터 호평을 받은 작품 중 하나로, 아카데미 작품상과 감독상을 포함해 총 4개의 오스카상을 수상했다. 그는 연기 활동도 계속 이어가며 **《브루베이커(Brubaker, 1980)》**에 출연했고, 1985년에는 **《아웃 오브 아프리카(Out of Africa)》**에서 남자 주연을 맡아 흥행에 대성공을 거두었다. 이 작품은 아카데미 작품상을 포함해 7개의 오스카상을 수상했다. 그는 1992년에 세 번째 연출작인 **《흐르는 강물처럼(A River Runs Through It)》**을 내놓았으며, 1995년에는 **《퀴즈 쇼(Quiz Show)》**로 감독상과 작품상 후보에 올랐다. 2002년에는 두 번째 아카데미상(평생공로상)을 수상했다. 2010년에는 프랑스에서 **레지옹 도뇌르 기사작위(Chevalier de la Légion d'Honneur)**를 받았다. 또한 그는 BAFTA, 미국감독조합상(DGA), 골든 글로브, 미국배우조합상(SAG) 등 수많은 상을 수상했다.
data.name: 로버트 레드포드

data.biography:
Charles Robert Redford Jr. (18 augustus 1936 - 16 september 2025) was een Amerikaanse acteur, regisseur en activist. Gedurende zijn carrière heeft hij verschillende filmprijzen gewonnen, waaronder een Academy Award for Lifetime Achievement in 2002. Hij was ook de oprichter van het Sundance Film Festival. In 2014 noemde Time Magazine hem een ​​van de 100 meest invloedrijke mensen ter wereld. In 2016 werd hij geëerd met een Presidential Medal of Freedom.

Redford's televisiecarrière begon eind jaren vijftig op het podium en begon in 1960, waaronder een optreden in The Twilight Zone in 1962. Hij verdiende een Emmy-nominatie als beste mannelijke bijrol voor zijn optreden in The Voice of Charlie Pont (1962). Zijn grootste Broadway-succes was als de bedompte, pasgetrouwde echtgenoot van het personage van medester Elizabeth Ashley in Neil Simon's Barefoot in the Park (1963). Redford maakte zijn filmdebuut in War Hunt (1962). Zijn rol in Inside Daisy Clover (1965) leverde hem een ​​Golden Globe op voor de beste nieuwe ster. Hij speelde samen met Paul Newman in Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid (1969), wat een enorm succes was en van hem een ​​grote ster maakte. Hij had een kritische en box office hit met Jeremiah Johnson (1972), en in 1973 had hij de grootste hit van zijn carrière, de kaskraker The Sting, een reünie met Paul Newman, waarvoor hij werd genomineerd voor een Academy Prijs; datzelfde jaar speelde hij ook tegenover Barbra Streisand in The Way We Were. Het populaire en veelgeprezen All the President's Men (1976) was een mijlpaal voor Redford.

In de jaren tachtig begon Redford zijn carrière als regisseur bij Ordinary People (1980), een van de meest door critici en publiek geprezen films van het decennium, met vier Oscars, waaronder die voor beste film en de Academy Award voor beste regisseur voor Redford. Hij bleef acteren en speelde in Brubaker (1980), en speelde ook de mannelijke hoofdrol in Out of Africa (1985), wat een enorm kassucces was en zeven Oscars won, waaronder die voor Beste Film. Hij bracht zijn derde film als regisseur uit, A River Runs Through It, in 1992. In 1995 ontving hij de nominaties voor Beste Regisseur en Beste Film voor Quiz Show. Hij ontving een tweede Academy Award - voor Lifetime Achievement - in 2002. In 2010 werd hij ridder van het Légion d'Honneur. Hij heeft BAFTA, Directors Guild of America, Golden Globe en Screen Actors Guild awards gewonnen.
data.name: Robert Redford

data.biography: Robert Redford, nom amb què es coneix Charles Robert Redford, Jr. (Santa Monica, Califòrnia, 18 d'agost de 1936) és un actor, director, productor i filantrop estatunidenc. És també l'amo i fundador de Sundance Resort, que més tard va donar lloc a la fundació del Festival de Cinema de Sundance i la creació del Sundance Channel. Entre altres premis, durant la seva carrera ha guanyat l'Oscar al millor director el 1981 per la pel·lícula Gent corrent, i l'Oscar honorífic el 2002. Va estudiar a l'institut Van Nuys de Los Angeles (Califòrnia), en el qual va formar part de l'equip de beisbol i on va conèixer Natalie Wood. Als 18 anys va caure en l'alcoholisme, potser pel fet de la mort de la seva mare, cosa que li va fer perdre una beca d'estudiant a la Universitat de Colorado. Més tard va estudiar pintura a l'Institut Pratt de Brooklyn i va viatjar per Europa; a la tornada, va fer classes d'escenografia teatral i interpretació a l'American Academy of Dramatic Arts de Nova York i va decidir-se per l'actuació.

چارلز رابرت ردفورد جونیور (زاده 18 اوت 1936) بازیگر، کارگردان و فعال آمریکایی است. او در طول دوران حرفه‌ای خود جوایز سینمایی متعددی از جمله جایزه اسکار یک عمر دستاورد در سال 2002 را دریافت کرده است. او همچنین بنیانگذار جشنواره فیلم ساندنس است. در سال 2014، مجله تایم او را به عنوان یکی از 100 فرد تأثیرگذار در جهان معرفی کرد. وی در سال 2016 با مدال آزادی ریاست جمهوری تجلیل شد.

با حضور روی صحنه در اواخر دهه 1950، حرفه تلویزیونی ردفورد در سال 1960 آغاز شد، از جمله حضور در منطقه گرگ و میش در سال 1962. او برای بازی در صدای چارلی پونت (1962) نامزدی امی را به عنوان بهترین بازیگر نقش مکمل مرد به دست آورد. بزرگترین موفقیت او در برادوی در نقش شوهر تازه ازدواج کرده شخصیت الیزابت اشلی در فیلم پابرهنه در پارک نیل سایمون (1963) بود. ردفورد اولین فیلم خود را در جنگ شکار (1962) انجام داد. بازی او در Inside Daisy Clover (1965) برای او جایزه گلدن گلوب بهترین ستاره جدید را به ارمغان آورد. او در کنار پل نیومن در بوچ کسیدی و ساندنس کید (1969) بازی کرد که موفقیت بزرگی بود و او را به یک ستاره بزرگ تبدیل کرد. او با جرمیا جانسون (1972) یک موفقیت منتقدانه و باکس آفیس داشت و در سال 1973 بهترین موفقیت حرفه ای خود را داشت، فیلم جنایی پرفروش The Sting، پیوند دوباره با پل نیومن، که برای آن نامزد اسکار شد. جایزه؛ در همان سال، او همچنین در کنار باربارا استرایسند در فیلم The Way We Were بازی کرد. فیلم محبوب و تحسین شده All the President's Men (1976) یک فیلم شاخص برای ردفورد بود.  در دهه 1980، ردفورد کار خود را به عنوان کارگردان با مردم عادی (1980) آغاز کرد، که یکی از فیلم‌های مورد اقبال عمومی و منتقدان دهه بود و برنده چهار جایزه اسکار از جمله بهترین فیلم و جایزه اسکار بهترین کارگردانی برای ردفورد شد. او به بازیگری ادامه داد و در بروبیکر (1980) بازی کرد و همچنین در فیلم خارج از آفریقا (1985) نقش اصلی مرد را بازی کرد که موفقیت بزرگی در باکس آفیس بود و هفت جایزه اسکار از جمله بهترین فیلم را برد. او سومین فیلم خود را به عنوان کارگردان، رودخانه ای از میان آن می گذراند، در سال 1992 منتشر کرد. او در سال 1995 نامزدی بهترین کارگردانی و بهترین فیلم را برای Quiz Show دریافت کرد. او دومین جایزه اسکار را - برای یک عمر دستاورد - در سال 2002 دریافت کرد. در سال 2010، او به عنوان قهرمان لژیون d'Honneur شناخته شد. او برنده جوایز بفتا، انجمن کارگردانان آمریکا، گلدن گلوب و انجمن بازیگران سینما شده است.وی همچنین درفیلم پیشنهاد بی شرمانه indecent-proposal(1993) در نقش مرد میلیادر جان گیج  ( John Gage) بازی کرد .  مترجم  :yavar.love

data.biography: Charles Robert Redford, Jr. (* 18. August 1936 in Santa Monica, Kalifornien) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler, Filmregisseur und Filmproduzent. Redford zählt seit den späten 1960er Jahren zu den populärsten Hollywoodschauspielern und war zwischen 1973 und 1976 der kassenträchtigste Filmstar. Er hat neun Spielfilme inszeniert und für sein Regiedebüt Eine ganz normale Familie 1981 den Oscar erhalten. Redford ist auch als Umweltschützer aktiv und unterstützt unter anderem den Natural Resources Defense Council.

Robert Redford, Jr. (Santa Mônica, 18 de agosto de 1936) é um ator, cineasta e produtor estadunidense, atuante principalmente nas décadas de 1960 e 1970, quando era considerado um dos maiores sex symbols masculinos do cinema americano. Como ator, estrelou alguns dos maiores sucessos de Hollywood da época, como The Chase, Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid, Barefoot in the Park, Three Days of the Condor, Jeremiah Johnson, The Sting, All the President's Men e mais recentemente em filmes como Indecent Proposal, Spy Game, Captain America: The Winter Soldier e Avengers: Endgame.

小查尔斯·罗伯特·雷德福（Charles Robert Redford Jr.，1936 年 8 月 18 日出生）是美国演员、导演和活动家。在他的整个职业生涯中，他赢得了多个电影奖项，包括 2002 年的奥斯卡终身成就奖。他也是圣丹斯电影节的创始人。2014年，《时代》杂志将他评为全球100位最具影响力的人物之一。2016年，他被授予总统自由勋章。

雷德福于 1950 年代后期出现在舞台上，他的电视生涯始于 1960 年，包括 1962 年在《暮光之城》中露面。他因在《查理庞特的声音》（1962 年）中的表演而获得艾美奖最佳男配角提名。他在百老汇最大的成功是在尼尔·西蒙（Neil Simon）的《公园里的赤脚》（1963）中扮演联合主演伊丽莎白·阿什利（Elizabeth Ashley）角色的闷闷不乐的新婚丈夫。雷德福在《战争狩猎》（1962 年）中首次亮相。他在《雏菊四叶草》（1965）中的角色为他赢得了金球奖最佳新星奖。他与保罗·纽曼一起出演了《布奇·卡西迪和圣丹斯小子》（1969 年），取得了巨大的成功，使他成为大明星。他与耶利米·约翰逊（Jeremiah Johnson，1972 年）合作获得了评论界和票房上的成功，1973 年，他获得了职业生涯中最大的成功，与保罗·纽曼 （Paul Newman） 重聚的犯罪大片《刺痛》（The Sting），并因此获得了奥斯卡金像奖提名;同年，他还在《我们曾经的样子》中与芭芭拉·史翠珊（Barbra Streisand）演对手戏。广受欢迎且广受赞誉的《总统的男人》（1976 年）是雷德福的一部里程碑式的电影。

在 1980 年代，雷德福以《普通人》（1980 年）开始了他的导演生涯，这是十年来最受好评和最受公众好评的电影之一，为雷德福赢得了包括最佳影片和奥斯卡最佳导演奖在内的四项奥斯卡奖。他继续演戏并出演了布鲁贝克（1980 年），并在《走出非洲》（1985 年）中扮演男主角，这部电影取得了巨大的票房成功，并获得了包括最佳影片在内的七项奥斯卡奖。1992年，他发行了他作为导演的第三部电影《一条河流贯穿其中》。1995 年，他凭借《问答秀》获得最佳导演和最佳影片提名。2002年，他获得了第二个奥斯卡终身成就奖。2010年，他被授予荣誉军团骑士勋章。他曾获得英国电影学院奖、美国导演工会奖、金球奖和演员工会奖。
data.name: 罗伯特·雷德福

data.biography:
小查爾斯·羅拔·烈福（Charles Robert Redford Jr. ，1936 年 8 月 18 日出生）是美國演員、導演和活動家。在他的整個職業生涯中，他贏得了多個電影獎項，包括 2002 年的奧斯卡終身成就獎。他也是聖丹斯電影節的創始人。2014 年，《時代》雜誌將他評為全球 100 位最具影響力的人物之一。2014 年，獲得美國林肯中心電影協會頒發的「卓別靈大獎」，以表彰他在電影上的貢獻。2016 年，他被授豫總統自由勳章。

1950 年代，烈福就像許多大明星一樣，在紐約市開始以舞台和電視竄起。烈福在許多電視節目演出，包括《The Untouchables》、《Alfred Hitchcock Presents》、《Route 66》、《Dr.Kildare》、《Playhouse 90》等。烈福曾以《The Voice of Charlie Pont》獲得艾美獎最佳男配角獎提名。

烈福最初在百老匯祇是飾演些小角色，處女作為《Tall Story》，隨後演出《The Highest Tree》、《Sunday in New York》，烈福真正在舞台上獲得成功是《鬥氣夫妻》（Barefoot in the Park）。

珍·芳達和羅拔·烈福在大銀幕版的熱門影片《鬥氣夫妻》（1967）中再次搭檔，多年後又在波拉克執導的《電騎士》（1979）中再次聯想主演，38 年後，他們又合作演出了 Netflix 的長片《夜色下的靈魂》。在最初的成功之後，羅拔·烈福開始擔心自己金髮男子的刻板印象，並拒絕演出《靈慾春宵》和《畢業生》。羅拔·烈福在佐治·萊·希爾執導的、威廉·戈德曼編劇的《神鎗手與智多星》（1969）中找到了自己想要的定位，並在其中首次與保羅·紐曼搭檔。這部電影大獲成功，使他成為了一位賣座明星，鞏固了他聰明、可靠、有時還帶著諷刺意味的好人的銀幕形象。

雖然羅拔·烈福沒有憑藉飾演辛丹斯小子獲得奧斯卡金像獎或金球獎提名，但他憑藉該角色以及在《飛魂谷》（1969）和《追兇三千裏》（1969）中的角色獲得了英國電影電視藝術學院獎。後兩部電影以及隨後的《疾速暴走族》（1970）和《神偷盜寶》（1972）均未取得商業成功。烈福長期以來一直懷抱著在鏡頭前和鏡頭後都工作的野心。早在 1969 年，烈福就擔任了《飛魂谷》的執行製作人。政治諷刺片《總統候選人》（1972）獲得了一定的票房和評論界成功。

從 1973 年開始，羅拔·烈福經歷了幾乎無與倫比的四年票房成功。西部片《猛虎過山》（1972）從 1973 年初到 1975 年第二次重新上映的票房收入，使其成為 1973 年票房第二高的電影。由芭芭拉·史翠珊主演的浪漫時代劇《俏郎君》（1973）是 1973 年票房第五高的電影。與保羅·紐曼重聚的犯罪驚栗片《老千計狀元才》（1973）成為 1974 年票房最高的電影，並根據通貨膨脹率調整後成為有史以來票房最高的 20 部電影之一，此外，羅拔·烈福還獲得了其職業生涯中唯一一次奧斯卡最佳男主角獎提名。隔年，他主演了浪漫劇情片《大亨小傳》（1974），由美雅·花露、山姆·華森和布魯士·甸主演。這部電影是 1974 年票房排名第八的電影。《神鎗手與智多星》（1969）因《老千計狀元才》的受歡迎程度而重新上映，成為 1974 年票房第十的電影。1974 年，羅拔·烈福成為自 1946 年冰·哥羅士比以來第一位在一年內有三部電影進入票房前十的演員。從 1974 年到 1976 年，每年電影放映商投票選出烈福為荷裏活最佳票房明星。

1995 年，烈福獲得巴德學院所頒發的文學博士學位。2005 年 12 月，烈福因對美國文化的貢獻而獲得甘迺迪中心榮譽獎，能夠獲得這個獎項，主要是依據受獎人對於舞蹈、音樂、戲劇、電影、電視等項目。

2018 年 8 月 6 日，烈福宣佈在他的最後一部電影《老人與槍》完成後退休結束演員生涯
data.name: 羅拔·烈福

data.biography:
Charles Robert Redford Jr. (18 de agosto de 1936 – 16 de setembro de 2025) foi um ator, diretor e ativista americano. Ao longo de sua carreira, ele conquistou diversos prêmios de cinema, incluindo o Oscar de Melhor Diretor por seu filme de 1980 Gente como a Gente (Ordinary People). Também recebeu um Oscar honorário por Contribuição ao Cinema em 2002 e foi o fundador do Sundance Film Festival. Em 2014, a revista Time o incluiu na lista das 100 pessoas mais influentes do mundo, e em 2016 foi homenageado com a Medalha Presidencial da Liberdade.

Iniciando sua carreira no teatro no final da década de 1950, Redford estreou na televisão em 1960, incluindo uma participação em The Twilight Zone em 1962. Recebeu uma indicação ao Emmy de Melhor Ator Coadjuvante por sua atuação em The Voice of Charlie Pont (1962). Seu maior sucesso na Broadway foi como o marido recém-casado sisudo da personagem de Elizabeth Ashley na peça de Neil Simon Barefoot in the Park (1963). Redford fez sua estreia no cinema em War Hunt (1962). Seu papel em Inside Daisy Clover (1965) lhe rendeu um Globo de Ouro de Melhor Nova Estrela. Ele estrelou ao lado de Paul Newman em Butch Cassidy (1969), que foi um enorme sucesso e o transformou em uma grande estrela. Teve sucesso de crítica e bilheteria com Jeremiah Johnson (1972), e em 1973 alcançou o maior sucesso de sua carreira com o blockbuster de crime Golpe de Mestre (The Sting), reunindo novamente Paul Newman, pelo qual foi indicado ao Oscar; no mesmo ano, também atuou ao lado de Barbra Streisand em Nosso Amor de Ontem (The Way We Were). O popular e aclamado Todos os Homens do Presidente (All the President's Men, 1976) foi um marco em sua carreira.

Nos anos 1980, Redford iniciou sua carreira como diretor com Gente como a Gente (1980), um dos filmes mais aclamados pela crítica e pelo público da década, vencedor de quatro Oscars, incluindo Melhor Filme, e lhe rendendo o Oscar de Melhor Diretor. Continuou atuando, estrelando Brubaker (1980) e interpretando o papel principal masculino em Entre Dois Amores (Out of Africa, 1985), um enorme sucesso de bilheteria que ganhou sete Oscars, incluindo Melhor Filme. Lançou seu terceiro filme como diretor, A River Runs Through It (1992). Recebeu indicações ao Oscar de Melhor Diretor e Melhor Filme em 1995 por Quiz Show. Recebeu seu segundo Oscar – desta vez por Contribuição ao Cinema – em 2002. Em 2010, foi feito cavaleiro da Légion d'Honneur. Além disso, conquistou prêmios do BAFTA, Directors Guild of America, Globo de Ouro e Screen Actors Guild.

data.name: ロバート・レッドフォード

data.biography:
Робърт Редфорд (1936–2025) е американски актьор, режисьор и филантроп, чиято кариера обхваща шест десетилетия и го превръща в символ на класическото холивудско кино. Той почина на 16 септември 2025 г. на 89-годишна възраст.  Ключови постижения:  Става световна звезда с роли в емблематични филми като „Бъч Касиди и Сънданс Кид“ (1969), „Ужилването“ (единствената му номинация за „Оскар“ за актьор) и „Далеч от Африка“.

Режисура: Печели „Оскар“ за най-добър режисьор още с дебюта си зад камерата — драмата „Обикновени хора“ (1980).

Кинофестивалът „Сънданс“: Основател на института и фестивала „Сънданс“, който се превръща в най-значимата платформа за независимо кино в света.  Най-популярни филми:

„Бъч Касиди и Сънданс Кид“ (1969)

„Каквито бяхме“ (1973)

„Ужилването“ (1973)

„Цялото президентско войнство“ (1976)

„Далеч от Африка“ (1985)

Освен с кино, Редфорд е известен със своя активизъм в подкрепа на околната среда и политическите каузи. През 2016 г. е удостоен с Президентския медал на свободата — най-високото гражданско отличие в САЩ.
data.name: Робърт Редфорд

data.biography:
Charles Robert Redford Jr. (18 agosto 1936 – 16 settembre 2025) è stato un attore, regista e attivista statunitense. Nel corso della sua carriera, ha vinto numerosi premi cinematografici, tra cui l'Oscar come miglior regista per il suo film del 1980 Gente comune. Ha anche ricevuto un Oscar onorario alla carriera nel 2002 ed è stato anche il fondatore del Sundance Film Festival. Nel 2014, la rivista Time lo ha nominato una delle 100 persone più influenti al mondo e nel 2016 è stato insignito della Medaglia presidenziale della libertà.

Apparendo sul palco alla fine degli anni '50, la carriera televisiva di Redford iniziò nel 1960, inclusa un'apparizione in Ai confini della realtà nel 1962. Ha ottenuto una nomination agli Emmy come miglior attore non protagonista per la sua interpretazione in The Voice of Charlie Pont (1962). Il suo più grande successo a Broadway è stato come il soffocante marito novello della co-protagonista Elizabeth Ashley nel film di Neil Simon A piedi nudi nel parco (1963). Redford ha fatto il suo debutto cinematografico in War Hunt (1962). Il suo ruolo in Inside Daisy Clover (1965) gli è valso un Golden Globe come migliore nuova star. Ha recitato al fianco di Paul Newman in Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid (1969), che è stato un enorme successo e lo ha reso una grande star. Ha avuto un successo di critica e di botteghino con Jeremiah Johnson (1972), e nel 1973 ha avuto il più grande successo della sua carriera, il blockbuster poliziesco La stangata, una reunion con Paul Newman, per il quale è stato nominato per un Academy Award; nello stesso anno, ha anche recitato al fianco di Barbra Streisand in Come eravamo. Il popolare e acclamato Tutti gli uomini del presidente (1976) è stato un film di riferimento per Redford.

Negli anni '80, Redford ha iniziato la sua carriera di regista con Gente comune (1980), che è stato uno dei film più acclamati dalla critica e dal pubblico del decennio, vincendo quattro Oscar tra cui miglior film e l'Oscar come miglior regista per Redford. Ha continuato a recitare e ha recitato in Brubaker (1980), oltre a interpretare il protagonista maschile in La mia Africa (1985), che è stato un enorme successo al botteghino e ha vinto sette Oscar tra cui quello per il miglior film. Ha pubblicato il suo terzo film da regista, A River Runs Through It, nel 1992. Ha continuato a ricevere nomination come miglior regista e miglior film nel 1995 per Quiz Show. Ha ricevuto un secondo Academy Award, alla carriera, nel 2002. Nel 2010 è stato nominato cavaliere della Legion d'Onore. Ha inoltre vinto i premi BAFTA, Directors Guild of America, Golden Globe e Screen Actors Guild.

data.biography:
Tao Okamoto (岡本 多緒 Okamoto Tao, born May 22, 1985) known professionally as Tao, is a Japanese actress and model, who is, alongside Ai Tominaga and Hiroko Matsumoto, one of the biggest models from Japan. In 2009, she was one of the faces of Ralph Lauren. She made her film debut as the female lead Mariko Yashida in the 2013 film The Wolverine; and played Mercy Graves in the 2016 film Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice. She has had recurring roles in the television series Hannibal, The Man in the High Castle, and Westworld.

Tao was born in Chiba, Japan. She started modeling as a teenager in Japan, when she was 14 years old.

In 2006, she made a decision to move to Paris and develop her career on an international level. Soon after that, Tao made her debut on the European runways, one of the few prominent East Asian models of that era. In 2009, Tao moved to New York City.

Tao has worked in advertising and editorial projects. She has fronted campaigns such as Dolce & Gabbana with Mario Testino, Emporio Armani by Alasdair McLellan, Kenzo with Mario Sorrenti, and Tommy Hilfiger with Craig McDean. Editorially, she has shot for i-D Magazine, V Magazine, W Magazine, and various international editions of Harper's Bazaar and Vogue.

The November 2009 issue of Vogue Nippon (Japanese Vogue) is dedicated to Tao. She was the Japan Fashion Editor's Club "Model of the Year" and was one of Vogue Nippon's "Women of the Year" in 2010.
data.name: Tao Okamoto

” 她後來澄清説，這是十年前的事，此後與 MediaCorp 解決了慘敗，但她的新合同的細節未知。

data.biography: Born and raised in Montebello, California, actress Chelsea Rendon has been a working actress since the age of 7, after booking a leading role in the feature film "No Turning Back", which went onto win multiple awards for her portrayal of Cristina. She continued to work on shows such as "E.R.", "The Shield", and "Judging Amyas" a child, and recently worked on Disney's "McFarland, USA", starred in Netflix original hit "Bright", and has recurred on Freeform's "The Fosters". Most recognized for her role as Ruthie in the Oscar-nominated film "A Better Life", Chelsea is taking a page from the same book and channeling a young, "woke" activist by the name of Mari in STARZ' upcoming drama "Vida". Chelsea stars alongside Mishel Prada and Melissa Barrera in the half-hour drama series focusing on two Mexican-American sisters from the east side of Los Angeles. As an actor who is attracted to empowering female roles, Chelsea draws inspiration from the likes of Viola Davis, Mariska Hargitay and Taraji P. Henson, and hopes to one day produce her content and try her hand in directing. Chelsea enjoys practicing karate, eating her way through the city's best tacos, and finding time to catch up on her favorite televi-sion shows.
data.name: Chelsea Rendon

data.biography: 女演员切尔西·伦登 （Chelsea Rendon） 在加利福尼亚州蒙特贝罗出生和长大，自 7 岁起就成为一名职业女演员，此前她在故事片《不回头》中担任主角，该片因饰演克里斯蒂娜而获得多个奖项。她继续参与《E.R.》、《The Shield》和《Judging Amyas》等节目，最近还参与了迪士尼的《美国麦克法兰》的制作，出演了 Netflix 原创热门剧集《Bright》，并再次出现在 Freeform 的《The Fosters》中。切尔西因在奥斯卡提名电影《美好生活》中饰演露茜而广为人知，她从同一本书中汲取灵感，并在 STARZ 即将上映的电视剧《维达》中引导一位名叫玛丽的年轻“觉醒”活动家。切尔西与米歇尔·普拉达（Mishel Prada）和梅丽莎·巴雷拉（Melissa Barrera）一起出演了这部半小时的剧集，讲述了来自洛杉矶东部的两对墨西哥裔美国姐妹的故事。作为一名被赋予女性角色的演员，切尔西从维奥拉·戴维斯、玛丽斯卡·哈吉泰和塔拉吉·P·汉森等人那里汲取灵感，并希望有一天能制作她的内容并尝试导演。切尔西喜欢练习空手道，吃着这个城市最好的炸玉米饼，并抽出时间赶上她最喜欢的电视节目。
data.name: 切尔西·伦登

data.biography: 女演員切爾西·倫登 （Chelsea Rendon） 在加利福尼亞州蒙特貝羅出生和長大，自 7 歲起就成為一名職業女演員，此前她在故事片《不回頭》中擔任主角，該片因飾演克里斯蒂娜而獲得多個獎項。她繼續參與《E.R. 》、《The Shield》和《Judging Amyas》等節目，最近還參與了迪士尼的《美國麥克法蘭》的製作，出演了 Netflix 原創熱門劇集《Bright》，並再次出現在 Freeform 的《The Fosters》中。切爾西因在奧斯卡提名電影《美好生活》中飾演露茜而廣為人知，她從同一本書中汲取靈感，並在 STARZ 即將上映的電視劇《維達》中引導一位名叫瑪麗的年輕“覺醒”活動家。切爾西與米歇爾·普拉達（Mishel Prada）和梅麗莎·巴雷拉（Melissa Barrera）一起出演了這部半小時的劇集，講述了來自洛杉磯東部的兩對墨西哥裔美國姐妹的故事。作為一名被賦豫女性角色的演員，切爾西從維奧拉·戴維斯、瑪麗斯卡·哈吉泰和塔拉吉·P·漢森等人那裏汲取靈感，並希望有一天能製作她的內容並嘗試導演。切爾西喜歡練習空手道，吃著這個城市最好的炸玉米餅，並抽出時間趕上她最喜歡的電視節目。
data.name: 切爾西·倫登

data.biography:
Alex Kingston (born 11 March 1963) is an English actress. Active from the early 1980s, Kingston became noted for her television work in both Britain and the US in the 1990s, including her regular role as Dr. Elizabeth Corday in the NBC medical drama ER (1997–2004) and her title role in the ITV miniseries The Fortunes and Misfortunes of Moll Flanders (1996), which earned her a BAFTA nomination for Best Actress.

Kingston's later credits include the recurring role of River Song in the BBC science fiction series Doctor Who (2008–2015), Mrs. Bennet in the ITV period-drama fantasy Lost in Austen (2008), Dinah Lance in The CW's superhero fiction drama series Arrow (2013–2016), and Sarah Bishop in A Discovery of Witches (2018–2022).
data.name: Alex Kingston

data.biography: Alexandra Elizabeth "Alex" Kingston (11 de marzo de 1963) es una actriz inglesa, conocida principalmente por su trabajo como la Dra. Elizabeth Corday en la serie de televisión ER, así como por su papel de River Song en la serie Doctor Who.

Alexandra Elizabeth „Alex“ Kingston (* 11. März 1963 in Epsom, Surrey) ist eine britische Schauspielerin.

Alex Kingston wurde am 11. März 1963 als Tochter von Anthony Kingston und dessen deutscher Frau Margarethe Kingston – geborene Renneisen – in Epsom in der englischen Grafschaft Surrey geboren. Ihr Onkel ist der deutsche Schauspieler Walter Renneisen, der deutsche Schauspieler Mathias Renneisen ist ihr Cousin.

Bekannt ist Kingston in erster Linie für die Darstellung der Dr. Elizabeth Corday in der US-amerikanischen Krankenhausserie Emergency Room – Die Notaufnahme, die sie von 1997 bis 2004 spielte. Sie erklärte zunächst, man hätte sie ihres Alters wegen entlassen. Später nahm sie diese Aussage jedoch zurück. 2009 kehrte sie in zwei Gastauftritten in ihre Rolle zurück.

In der britischen Science-Fiction-Serie Doctor Who verkörperte Kingston von 2008 bis 2015 wiederkehrend die Rolle der River Song.

In ihrer ersten Ehe von 1993 bis zum Oktober 1997 war Kingston mit dem britischen Schauspielkollegen Ralph Fiennes verheiratet. Am 29. Dezember 1998 heiratete sie Florian Haertel, einen deutschen Journalisten. Die gemeinsame Tochter wurde am 28. März 2001 geboren und spielte in einer Episode von Emergency Room in der 8. Staffel ihre Serientochter. 2010 trennte sie sich von ihrem zweiten Ehemann. Am 18. Juli 2015 heiratete sie in Rom den Fernsehproduzenten Jonathan Stamp. Sie spricht fließend Deutsch.

data.biography:
Mary Louise Wilson (born November 12, 1931) is an American actress, singer, and comedian. In a career that has spanned more than 50 years, she has appeared in numerous plays, films and television shows. In film, notable credits include Klute (1971), The Best Little Whorehouse in Texas (1982), Teachers (1984), The Money Pit (1986), Pet Sematary (1989), Green Card (1990), Stepmom (1998), Nebraska (2013), and Ocean's Eight (2018). Wilson has appeared in many television series such as Maude, Lou Grant, Remember WENN, Frasier, The Sopranos, Nurse Jackie, Mozart in the Jungle, Modern Family, and Orange Is the New Black, usually in guest roles.

Wilson has had scores of stage roles, making her Broadway debut in Hot Spot (1963) starring Judy Holliday. For her role as "Big" Edie Beale in the musical Grey Gardens (2006), Wilson won the Tony Award for Best Performance by a Featured Actress in a Musical (alongside co-star Christine Ebersole's win for Best Leading actress). She was previously nominated in the same category for her role as Fräulein Schneider in the 1998 revival of Cabaret.
data.name: Mary Louise Wilson

Shin Min-ah, born April 5th, 1984 with the birth name Yang Min-ah (양민아), is a popular South Korean actress & model. Her family consists of a father, mother, older sister & brother. In middle school, she took a picture with her friends on a school picnic and sent the photo to the teen magazine KiKi ("키키"). From that picture, she was chosen as a model for the magazine. Afterward, she would first appear in commercials and music videos. In 2001, she made her acting debut in the movie "Volcano High" and would appear again two years later in "Madeleine". Her breakout performance would occur in the 2005 gangster film "A Bittersweet Life". Her character, Hee-soo, displayed a mixture of purity and maturity that captivated South Korean audiences. Since that time, she has received an assortment of acting offers from top Korean directors and expanded her acting repertoire by selecting various types of roles: from the martial-arts comedy "My Mighty Princess" to 70's go-go dancer "Go Go 70s" to the smaller independent film "Sisters on the Road".

More recently in 2009, Shin Min-ah participated in the project "Miracle Blue," which is a collaboration between herself, the Korean alternative band Loveholic, and the fashion design company, Calvin Klein. In the music video "Miracle Blue," in which she sings, she also performs as various characters displaying child-like innocence to the sexy blonde-haired singer.
data.name: Shin Min-a

申敏儿（Shin Min A），本名“杨慜娥”，1984年4月5日出生于韩国首尔市。韩国女演员、模特，毕业于韩国东国大学。

1998年，参加KiKi专属模特比赛夺得冠军，进入演艺圈。2001年12月，通过主演动作片《火山高校》，正式出道。2003年10月，拍摄爱情剧《打击》，获得SBS演技大赏新人奖。2005年4月，主演动作片《甜蜜的人生》。10月主演爱情剧《这该死的爱》。2008年6月，主演喜剧片《武林女大学生》。10月主演喜剧片《GOGO70》，获得第17届春史电影节最佳女主角奖。2009年，2月主演爱情片《厨房》。

2010年8月，主演喜剧《我的女友是九尾狐》，获得SBS演技大赏优秀女演员奖。2012年8月，主演古装剧《阿娘使道传》。2014年6月，主演喜剧片《庆州》。10月主演爱情片《我的爱我的新娘》。2015年11月，主演爱情剧《Oh My Venus》，获得第11届首尔国际电视节韩流最佳女演员奖。2017年2月，主演爱情剧《明天和你》。2019年6月，主演政治剧《辅佐官》。
data.name: 申敏儿

data.biography: Shin debutovala jako modelka pro časopis KiKi a od té doby se objevila v mnoha reklamách a stala se jednou z nejžádanějších reklamních tváří v Jižní Koreji. Kromě hraní ve filmech a televizních dramatech se objevila také v mnoha hudebních videoklipech.

Shin estreou como modelo para a KiKi Magazine e desde então apareceu em muitos anúncios de CF (filmes comerciais), tornando-se um dos endossantes de CF mais procurados na Coreia do Sul. Além de atuar em filmes e dramas de TV, ela também apareceu em vários videoclipes K-Pop, principalmente para G.O.D. e publicou um livro de viagens intitulado Minah's French Diary. Em 2005, ela estrelou a série de televisão A Love to Kill com o cantor Rain. Em 2010, ela estrelou o drama My Girlfriend is a Nine-Tailed Fox com Lee Seung Gi. Em 22 de julho de 2015, foi anunciado que ela estava namorando o ator Kim Woo Bin.

Sin Mina Szongnamban született Jang Mina néven. Karrierjét modellkedéssel kezdte, majd a g.o.d nevű népszerű fiúegyüttes klipjeiben szerepelt, mielőtt 2001-ben megkapta első szerepét a Beautiful Days című népszerű melodrámában. Ezután több filmhez is felkérték, szerepelt például Kim Dzsiun A Bittersweet Life című film noirjában, a Sad Movie című drámában pedig egy siket nőt alakított.

2005-ben már főszerepet játszott az A Love to Kill című sorozatban a popsztár Rain oldalán, melyet számos film követett ma már jól ismert színészpartnerekkel. Egyik legnépszerűbb szerepe mégis egy újabb televíziós sorozat lett, a My Girlfriend Is a Nine-Tailed Fox, ahol egy kumihót, kilencfarkú mitológiai rókanőt alakított, aki a legenda szerint férfiak májával táplálkozik.

2012-ben I Dzsungi (Lee Jun-gi) oldalán játszott az Arang and the Magistrate című fantasy sorozatban, ahol újabb népi hőst, egy Arang nevű szellemet alakított. 2014-ben a Gyeongju című filmben játszott, majd a My Love, My Bride című romantikus filmben volt látható. 2015-ben Szo Dzsiszop (So Ji-sub) partnere volt az Oh My Venus című romantikus vígjátéksorozatban. 2019-ben egy politikai drámasorozatban, a Chief of Staffban kapott főszerepet.

Sin Mina a modellkedést sem hagyta abba, látható volt például a Giordano kampányfilmjében, 2011-ben pedig az amerikai Rag & bone márka első ázsiai arca lett. Koreában számos márkát népszerűsít.

申敏兒（Shin Min A），本名“楊慜娥”，1984 年 4 月 5 日出生於韓國首爾市。韓國女演員、模特，畢業於韓國東國大學。

1998 年，參加 KiKi 專屬模特比賽奪得冠軍，進入演藝圈。2001 年 12 月，透過 通過主演動作片《火山高校》，正式出道。2003 年 10 月，拍攝愛情劇《打擊》，獲得 SBS 演技大賞新人獎。2005 年 4 月，主演動作片《不悔》。10 月主演愛情劇《情迷布加勒斯特》。2008 年 6 月，主演喜劇片《武林女大學生》。10 月主演喜劇片《GOGO70》，獲得第 17 屆春史電影節最佳女主角獎。2009 年，2 月主演愛情片《廚房》。

2010 年 8 月，主演喜劇《我的女友是九尾狐》，獲得 SBS 演技大賞優秀女演員獎。2012 年 8 月，主演古裝劇《阿孃使道傳》。2014 年 6 月，主演喜劇片《慶州》。10 月主演愛情片《我的愛我的新娘》。2015 年 11 月，主演愛情劇《Oh My Venus》，獲得第 11 屆首爾國際電視節韓流最佳女演員獎。2017 年 2 月，主演愛情劇《明天和你》。2019 年 6 月，主演政治劇《輔佐官》。
data.name: 申敏兒

data.biography: Edward Snowden is an American computer professional, former Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) employee and former contractor for the United States government who copied and leaked classified information from the National Security Agency (NSA) in 2013 without prior authorization. His disclosures revealed numerous global surveillance programs, many run by the NSA and the Five Eyes Intelligence Alliance with the cooperation of telecommunication companies and European governments.
data.name: Edward Snowden

data.biography: Chinmayi Sripaada is an Indian playback singer, working mainly for the South Indian film industry. She is also a voice actor, television presenter and radio jockey. She is the founder and CEO of a translation services company called Blue Elephant. She is often credited as Chinmayee/India Haza but her birth name is Chinmayi. She rose to fame for her critically acclaimed song "Oru Deivam Thantha Poovae" from the National Award winning movie Kannathil Muthamittal.
data.name: Chinmayi Sripaada

data.biography: John Patrick De Sena (born December 6, 1987) is an American actor. He is best known for his voice roles of Sokka on the Nickelodeon series Avatar: The Last Airbender (2005 - 2008) and Prince Callum on the Netflix series The Dragon Prince (2018 - 2024). He was also a regular performer in the Nickelodeon sketch comedy series All That from 2002 to 2005. Since January 19, 2016, DeSena and his longtime friend Chris W. Smith have been creating and starring in comedy sketches on their YouTube channel "Chris and Jack".
data.name: Jack De Sena

data.biography:
Jack De Sena, geboren am 6. Dezember 1987 in Boston, Massachusetts, ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler und Synchronsprecher. Bekannt wurde er vor allem durch seine Stimme als Sokka in der Nickelodeon-Zeichentrickserie Avatar – Der Herr der Elemente sowie als Prinz Callum in der Netflix-Serie Der Prinz der Drachen (The Dragon Prince).

Er begann seine Karriere als Darsteller in der Sketch-Comedy-Show All That (2002–2005) und gewann 2005 einen Young Artist Award für seine Leistung. Neben seinen Synchronrollen spielte er auch in Live-Action-Serien mit, beispielsweise als „Mr. Roberts“ in 100 Things to Do Before High School (2014–2016).

Darüber hinaus ist Jack De Sena für seine Improvisationsfähigkeiten bekannt und produziert zusammen mit seinem Freund Chris W. Smith Comedy-Sketche auf YouTube unter dem Kanal „Chris and Jack“.

Er wuchs in Irvine, Kalifornien, auf, nachdem seine Familie 1999 dorthin gezogen war, besuchte die Irvine High School und studierte später an der UCLA.

David Packard Corenswet (/ˈkɔːrənswɛt/CORE-in-SWET; born July 8, 1993) is an American actor. After graduating from Juilliard in 2016, he began guest-starring in television series, including House of Cards in 2018. He played lead roles in the Netflix series The Politician (2019–2020) and Hollywood (2020), both created by Ryan Murphy. In 2022, he starred in the films Look Both Ways and Pearl, as well as the HBO miniseries We Own This City. After supporting roles in the film Twisters and the miniseries Lady in the Lake (both 2024), he rose to prominence with his portrayal of the titular superhero in James Gunn's DC Universe film Superman (2025).

data.biography: David Packard Corenswet (Filadelfia, Pensilvania; 8 de julio de 1993) es un actor estadounidense conocido por interpretar a Clark Kent / Superman de DC Studios en el Universo DC, en la película Superman (2025). A lo largo de su carrera, ha destacado por su presencia en producciones de gran alcance, especialmente en la serie de Netflix The Politician (2019), en la que interpretó a un personaje clave. Corenswet también ha tenido papeles en otras producciones notables, como Hollywood (2020), otra serie de Netflix dirigida por Ryan Murphy, donde interpretó a un joven actor ambicioso en la época dorada de Hollywood. Su talento y versatilidad como actor lo han colocado como una de las promesas emergentes de la industria cinematográfica y televisiva estadounidense.
data.name: David Corenswet

data.biography: Né le 8 juillet 1993 à Philadelphie, Pennsylvanie, David Corenswet est un acteur américain en pleine ascension. Diplômé de la Juilliard School, il débute dans des séries comme House of Cards (2018) et The Politician (2019-2020), où il se distingue par son charisme. Il gagne en notoriété avec le rôle principal dans Hollywood (2020) de Ryan Murphy, incarnant Jack Castello. Au cinéma, il apparaît dans The Sun Is Also a Star (2019) et Pearl (2022). En 2023, il joue dans Lady in the Lake aux côtés de Natalie Portman. Son rôle le plus marquant est celui de Superman/Clark Kent dans Superman (2025), réalisé par James Gunn, marquant le lancement du nouveau DC Universe. Issu d’une famille d’avocats, Corenswet est également scénariste et producteur. Il vit à Los Angeles et est célibataire.

data.name: เดวิด คอเรนสเว็ต

data.biography:
David Corenswet ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler, der am 8. Juli 1993 in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, geboren wurde. Berühmtheit erlangte er insbesondere durch seine Rollen in den Netflix-Serien The Politician (2019) und Hollywood (2020). Seit 2023 ist er für die Hauptrolle als Superman im kommenden Film „Superman: Legacy“ bekannt, womit er Nachfolger von Henry Cavill wird.

Corenswets schauspielerische Laufbahn begann schon früh: Bereits mit neun Jahren spielte er am Arden Theatre in Philadelphia Theaterrollen. Später folgten weitere Theaterauftritte, etwa beim Philadelphia Shakespeare Festival, und kleinere Rollen am Theater, bevor er schließlich an der renommierten Juilliard School in New York sein Schauspielstudium absolvierte (Abschluss 2016).

Seine bisherige Karriere umfasst neben den Netflix-Serien Auftritte in Produktionen wie Affairs of State (2018), We Own This City (2022), Look Both Ways (2022), Pearl (2022) und Gastrollen in TV-Serien wie Elementary und Instinct. Bereits während seines Studiums produzierte er gemeinsam mit Adam Langdon die 17-teilige Comedy-Serie Moe & Jerryweather, die auf Vimeo erschien.

大衞·帕卡德·哥倫斯韋特（David Packard Corenswet，1993 年 7 月 8 日-），美國演員。2016 年從茱莉亞音樂學院畢業後，他開始客串主演電視劇，包括 2018 年的《紙牌屋》。隨後，他出演了由瑞恩·墨菲創作的 Netflix 劇集《政治家》（2019 - 2020 年）、《好萊塢》（2020 年）、Netflix 電影《雙向看》（2022 年）、HBO 迷你劇《我們擁有這座城市》（2022 年）、A24 電影《珍珠》（2022 年）和 Hulu 電影《最偉大的命中》（2024 年）。他將在詹姆斯·古恩的《超人》中扮演超人，該片將於 2025 年上映。
data.name: 大衞·哥倫斯韋

data.biography: Η Empress Karen Carreon Schuck-Guingona (γεννημένη στις 19 Φεβρουαρίου 1993), γνωστή και μονοώνυμα ως Empress, είναι Φιλιππινέζα ηθοποιός, μοντέλο, τραγουδίστρια, χορεύτρια και σχεδιάστρια μόδας.

Zaza asıllı, Aslen Muş - Varto Omeriyan köyündendir. Babası Anadolu'da birçok şehirde görev yapmış bir postacıydı. Babasının görevleri nedeni ile Solhan, Karlıova, Elazığ, Palu, Kovancılar, Diyarbakır ve Bursa da bulundu.[1]Mimar Sinan Güzel Sanatlar Üniversitesi (MSGSÜ) Devlet Konservatuvarı "Tiyatro" bölümünden mezun (1985) olan Sürmeli, Sokak Tiyatrosu, Dostlar Tiyatrosu ve Devlet Tiyatroları Genel Müdürlüğü'nde görev yaptı. Sinema filmleri ve dizilerde oynadı. İlk başrolü 1995 yılında oynadığı ve yönetmenliğini Tülay Eratalay'ın yaptığı Düş, Gerçek, Bir de Sinema adlı filmdir. Deli Yürek dizisiyle televizyonda tanındı. Kurtlar Vadisi Pusu dizisinde Zaza Dayı karakterini canlandırdı. Daha sonra Çarpışma adlı dizide Cansız rolünü canlandırdı. Son olarak, Eşkıya Dünyaya Hükümdar Olmaz dizisinde Doğan Baba karakteriyle rol aldı.
data.name: Ali Sürmeli

data.overview: Bối cảnh phim diễn ra vào năm 2013. Vào thời gian này, khu B13 được mệnh danh là khu phố phức tạp nhất của nước Pháp. Leito, chàng thanh niên sinh ra và lớn lên tại khu B13 không thể nào quên được cảnh tay trùm khu B13 binh thản dẫn em gái ra khỏi đồn cảnh sát về làm nô lệ còn anh thì bị tống giam. Sáu tháng sau, một quả bom có sức hủy diệt khổng lồ bị mất cắp đang đe dọa mạng sống của hàng trăm ngàn người dân vô tội. Leito được sắp xếp thả ra để kết hợp với Damien, thành viên ưu tú nhất của lực lượng cảnh sát đặc nhiệm, vô hiệu hóa quả bom. Được sự trợ giúp của Leito, hai người đột nhập vào sào huyệt của tên trùm. Thế nhưng với mục đích khác nhau, giữa Leito và Damien đa có xung đột, mà thời gian quả bom phát nổ đa gần kề.
data.title: Đặc Khu B13

data.biography: Ceren Moray Brun (d. 5 Haziran 1985, Diyarbakır), Kavak Yelleri ve O Hayat Benim adlı dizilerde canlandırdığı rollerle tanınan Türk oyuncu. Doğumundan birkaç yıl sonra ailesi ile birlikte İstanbul ’a taşınan ünlü oyuncu, tiyatro eğitimine küçük yaşlarda başladı. Uzun bir süre Pera Güzel Sanatlar ’da eğitim alan oyuncu, 2005 yılında Haliç Üniversitesi Tiyatro Bölümü ’nü kazandı ve 2009 yılında üniversiteden mezun oldu. İlk televizyon deneyimi, 12 yıl önce yayımlanan ve başrollerini Levent Üzümcü, Müjde Ar gibi isimlerin paylaştığı Serseri Aşıklar isimli dizi oldu. Bu diziden sonra televizyonun yolları kendisine açılmış oldu. Birkaç yıl televizyona ara vererek eğitimlerini sürdüren Moray, 2007-2010 yılları arasında Kanal D ’de ekrana gelen ve dönemin fenomen gençlik dizisi olan Kavak Yelleri dizisinde Su karakterini canlandırıyordu. Asıl büyük çıkışı, Fox TV ’de yayınlanan O Hayat Benim dizisindeki Efsun karakteri ile oldu. Eylül 2017'de Fransız sevgilisi Nicco Brun ile evlenmiştir.
data.name: Ceren Moray

data.biography:
Roger Guenveur Smith (born July 27, 1955) is an American actor, director, and writer best known for his collaborations with Spike Lee.

​From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
data.name: Roger Guenveur Smith

data.biography:
Roger Guenveur Smith, 27 Temmuz 1955 tarihinde Berkeley, Kaliforniya, ABD'de dünyaya gelmiş, son derece özgün tarzıyla tanınan Amerikalı bir aktör, yazar ve performans sanatçısıdır. Occidental College ve ardından Yale Drama Okulu gibi prestijli kurumlarda eğitim alan Smith, özellikle yönetmen Spike Lee ile yaptığı uzun soluklu ve verimli iş birliği ile tanınmaktadır.

Kariyerindeki en önemli dönüm noktası, Spike Lee'nin başyapıtı olarak kabul edilen "Doğru Seçim" (Do the Right Thing) (1989) filminde canlandırdığı, büyük ölçüde doğaçlamaya dayanan, kekeme ve Malcolm X'in fotoğraflarını satan Smiley karakteri oldu. Bu kısa ama unutulmaz rol, onu sinema dünyasına tanıttı. Spike Lee ile olan bu ortaklığı; "Okul Düşleri" (School Daze) (1988), "Malcolm X" (1992), "Otobüs" (Get on the Bus) (1996), "Oyunun Galibi" (He Got Game) (1998), "Chi-Raq" (2015) ve "Da 5 Bloods" (2020) gibi birçok ikonik filmle devam etti.

Oyunculuğunun yanı sıra Smith, sahne için yarattığı ve tek başına sahnelediği tarihi ve politik içerikli gösterileriyle de büyük saygı görmektedir. Kara Panter Partisi'nin kurucusu Huey P. Newton'ı canlandırdığı "A Huey P. Newton Story" adlı tek kişilik gösterisiyle Obie Ödülü kazandı. Bu oyun, daha sonra yine Spike Lee tarafından televizyon için filme çekildi. Benzer şekilde, polis şiddetine maruz kalan Rodney King'in hikayesini anlattığı "Rodney King" adlı gösterisi de Spike Lee yönetmenliğinde bir Netflix özel gösterisi olarak yayınlandı.

Kariyeri boyunca "King of New York" (1990), "Deep Cover" (1992) ve Ridley Scott'ın yönettiği "Amerikan Gangsteri" (American Gangster) (2007) gibi birçok önemli filmde yer aldı. Daha çok dramatik rolleriyle tanınsa da, Smith aynı zamanda hit korku filmi "Son Durak"ta (Final Destination) (2000) da yer aldı. Filmde Ajan Schreck'i canlandırarak, Daniel Roebuck ve serinin diğer genç yıldızlarıyla aynı ekranı paylaştı.

Roger Guenveur Smith, hem Spike Lee filmlerindeki unutulmaz karakterleri hem de sahnede hayat verdiği güçlü tarihi figürlerle, kuşağının en kendine özgü ve entelektüel derinliğe sahip sanatçılarından biri olarak kabul edilmektedir.

data.biography:
Seann William Scott (geboren am 3. Oktober 1976) ist ein amerikanischer Schauspieler und Komiker. Er ist vor allem dafür bekannt, dass er Steve Stifler in der American Pie-Serie von Teenager-Sex-Comedy-Filmen gespielt hat. Er ist auch bekannt für seine Rollen in den Filmen Final Destination, Road Trip, Dude, Where's My Car?, Evolution, The Rundown, The Dukes of Hazzard, Role Models und Cop Out.

Beschreibung oben aus dem Wikipedia-Artikel Seann William Scott, lizenziert unter CC-BY-SA, vollständige Liste der Autoren auf Wikipedia.

Zadebiutował na dużym ekranie rolą w przebojowej komedii "American Pie". Ostatnio można go było oglądać w dreszczowcu "Final Destination". Dorastający w Minnesocie Scott wcześnie zdecydował, że chce zostać aktorem. Po ukończeniu szkoły wyjechał więc do Los Angeles, aby dopomóc swojej karierze. Wkrótce potem otrzymał role w seriach TV - "Something So Right" i "Sweet Valley High". Wystąpił także w teledysku Aerosmith "A Hole in My Soul". Po zakończeniu zdjęć do "Ostrej jazdy" Scott sam wyruszył w trwającą miesiąc podróż autostopem po Australii.

Шонн Уильям Скотт родился 3 октября 1976 года в городке Коттедж-Гроув, штат Миннесота, США, и в юности работал в местном кинотеатре, часто оставаясь на вторую смену, чтобы успеть посмотреть все фильмы. У Шонна никогда не было проблем с друзьями. В то время, когда большинство будущих голливудских кинозвезд походило на "гадких утят" и тайно мечтало об актерской карьере, раскованный и энергичный паренек Шонн шел по жизни уверенно и в окружении верных товарищей. Он активно занимался спортом - одновременно американским футболом, баскетболом и бейсболом и дни и ночи напролет гонял с парнями по улицам города. Не случайно, что когда в школе выбирали обладателя титула "любимчик класса", Шонн Уильям Скотт победил с неоспоримым преимуществом. "Мне нравилось быть лидером, что называется, "наводить шорох"! - Вспоминает актер. - Особенно мне удавались шумные вечеринки!" Не всем везет с родителями, но Шонн и здесь на высоте. Отец и мать обожали младшего в семье, насчитывающей аж СЕМЬ детей, и потакали многим его причудам. Например, купили ему: надувную подводную лодку, в которой он чуть не утонул в бассейне. Любвеобильные папа и мама часто уединялись наверху в спальне, и юный Шонн рано познал таинство и величие родительского секса. "Они мне обычно говорили, взявшись за руки и переглядываясь: Шонн, иди к Митчеллу, поиграй в мяч! Когда я отвечал, что был там час назад, они говорили: Ну пойди поиграй еще! Услышав первые характерные звуки, доносящиеся из спальни, я вылетал из дома как Форрест Гамп."

Став киноактёром, Шонн отблагодарил родителей за счастливое детство: он обеспечил отцу, работнику местной фабрики по производству клеющей ленты, досрочный выход на пенсию! Переворот в его сознании состоялся в подростковом возрасте, когда Шонн в поисках легкого заработка устроился на каникулы в городской кинотеатр. Здесь он на халяву посмотрел огромное количество фильмов и решил, что станет одним из тех "небожителей", что вызывали восторг в зрительном зале. "Я никогда не участвовал в школьной самодеятельности, не играл в домашних спектаклях. Но мысль, что моя игра может понравиться друзьям и родителям, меня возбуждала невероятно. Я верил в собственные исключительные силы и успех!" Поначалу в Лос-Анджелесе ему, как и тысячам других новичков, не везло - он перебивался случайным заработком (в длинном перечне освоенных профессий значатся даже сантехник и продавец корма в зоопарке). Засветился в нескольких телесериалах с парой-другой второстепенных фраз, поучаствовал в рекламе "American Express" и даже сыграл одну из главных "ролей" в видеоролике "Hole In My Soul" группы "Aerosmith".
data.name: Шонн Уильям Скотт

data.biography:
Seann William Scott, 3 Ekim 1976 tarihinde Cottage Grove, Minnesota, ABD'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Liseden mezun olduktan sonra oyunculuk hayalinin peşinden gitmek için Los Angeles'a taşınan Scott, kariyerinin başlarında çeşitli seçmelere katılarak kendine bir yer edinmeye çalıştı.

Ancak onu bir gecede uluslararası bir yıldıza dönüştüren ve adını popüler kültürle özdeşleştiren rol, 1999 yapımı gençlik komedisi klasiği "Amerikan Pastası"nda (American Pie) canlandırdığı, parti meraklısı, ağzı bozuk ama karizmatik Steve Stifler karakteri oldu. Stifler karakteri, 2000'li yılların başındaki gençlik komedisi türünün en ikonik ve tanınan figürlerinden biri haline geldi. Scott, bu rolle "Amerikan Pastası 2" (2001), "Amerikan Düğünü" (American Wedding) (2003) ve "Amerikan Pastası: Buluşma" (American Reunion) (2012) filmlerinde de yer alarak bir neslin komedi ikonu statüsünü pekiştirdi.

Komedi filmlerindeki büyük çıkışına paralel olarak, 2000 yılında bir başka ikonik filmde daha yer aldı. Hit korku filmi "Son Durak"ta (Final Destination) canlandırdığı grubun komik ve gergin üyesi Billy Hitchcock karakteriyle de büyük beğeni topladı. Bu rol, onu Devon Sawa, Ali Larter ve Kerr Smith gibi dönemin diğer genç yıldızlarıyla aynı unutulmaz korku filminde bir araya getirdi.

2000'li yıllar boyunca "Geyik Muhabbeti" (Road Trip) (2000), "Çılgınlar ve Sevgililer" (Dude, Where's My Car?) (2000) gibi filmlerle komedi türündeki başarısını sürdürdü. Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson ile başrolü paylaştığı "Zor Seçim" (The Rundown) (2003) filmiyle aksiyon-komedi türündeki yeteneğini de kanıtladı. Ayrıca, dünya çapında büyük bir başarı yakalayan animasyon serisi "Buz Devri"nde (Ice Age), opossum karakteri Crash'i seslendirerek seslendirme alanında da uzun soluklu bir kariyere imza attı.

İlerleyen yıllarda, "Goon" (2011) filmindeki dramatik hokey oyuncusu rolüyle eleştirmenlerden büyük övgü alarak oyunculuk yelpazesinin ne kadar geniş olduğunu gösterdi. Ayrıca, "Lethal Weapon" (2018-2019) dizisinin son sezonunda Martin Riggs rolünü devraldı ve "Becky" (2020) gibi filmlerde alışılmışın dışında kötü adam rollerini canlandırdı. Seann William Scott, en çok Stifler karakteriyle hatırlansa da, kariyeri boyunca dramdan aksiyona uzanan çok yönlü bir sanatçı olduğunu kanıtlamıştır.

Шонн Вільям Скотт (народився 3 жовтня 1976 року), також відомий як Фрубель, — американський актор і комік. Найбільшу популярність він здобув завдяки ролі Стіва Стіфлера в серії молодіжних секс-комедій «Американський пиріг». Також відомий за ролями у фільмах «Пункт призначення», «Дорожня пригода», «Чувак, де моя тачка?», «Еволюція», «У гонитві за щастям», «Герцоги з Газзарда», «Справжні пацани» та «Двійник копа».

data.biography:
Bill Fagerbakke est un acteur américain né le 4 octobre 1957 à Fontana (Californie).

Il est apparu dans de nombreux rôles à la télévision tels que le coach "Dauber" Dybinski dans la sitcom Coach, mais aussi au cinéma dans Funny Farm, et dans plusieurs pièces de théâtre à Broadway. En 1999, il a joué le rôle de l'officier Karl Metzger dans la série télévisée Oz diffusée sur HBO. Il est aussi depuis cette date la voix de Patrick Étoile de mer dans la série d'animation Bob l'éponge.

À la télévision, il est surtout connu pour son rôle de l'attardé sympathique Tom Cullen (M.O.O.N) dans la série Le Fléau, inspirée de l'œuvre de Stephen King, en 1994. En 2007, il a fait un caméo dans la série Heroes où il interprète Steve Gustavson dans les épisodes Mauvaises rencontres et Inattendus et en 2009 il a joué dans le film Jennifer's Body.

Margot was born in September 1949. Growing up in Middleton in Lancashire  she attended Bury Grammar school, whose theatre trips to Stratford on  Avon, the Manchester Exchange and Octagon Theatre, Bolton, led to her  interest in acting. On leaving school she read English, aptly enough at  the University of Leicester, and on graduation worked in repertory  theatres around the country. In 1972, whilst appearing at the Dukes  Theatre, Lancaster, she met the director David Thacker and they married  two years later, eventually raising four children. They have  subsequently worked together on numerous occasions - with Margot being  nominated for an Olivier award in 1994 for their collaboration on the  play 'Breaking Glass' at the National Theatre. In 2008 David became the  artistic director at the Octagon, working with Margot on acclaimed  productions of 'Who's Afraid of Virginia Woolf', 'The Glass Menagerie'  and 'Long Day's Journey Into Night'. Margot is also a director of the  Haringey Shed Company, a London-based theatre group which encourages  teenagers to take up acting.
